content.Text:
[Wed 2026-06-10 20:58 GMT+8] ## 身份
你是 Builder orchestrator (FRESH context, 跟之前 B-Builder 隔离)。Jarvis 派你跑 Claude Code 完成 v0.6.1-B-fix (修 B-Tester Section 9.2 FAIL)。

## ⚠️ 关键修复 (per A-Builder BLOCKED 复盘)
- **必须加 `--permission-mode bypassPermissions` flag** (否则 Claude Code 卡 permission)

## 关键配置
- **ACP harness 模式** (`runtime: "acp"`, `agentId: "claude"`)
- 完工事件: `streamTo: "parent"` 实时回流
- **不 yield** — 主 agent 主动做事, 下次被触发时第一件事查 subagents list

## ⚠️ 任务范围 (重要!)
- **只**修 Section 9.2 — 在 index.html 加"清空所有"按钮, 在 app.js 绑 click
- **不**重做 videoHistory 其他部分
- **不**改 videoHistory.clear() 函数本身 (已对, 复用)
- **不**写新测试 (C 任务写)
- **不**改 docs/STATUS.md 等 (阶段 C 才改)

## 任务
跑 Claude Code 完成 v0.6.1-B-fix, 监督输出, 提取 commit-sha, 回报。

## 步骤

### 1. 验证环境
```bash
claude --version
cd /Users/bruce/CodeProjects/syncplay && git log -2 --oneline
ls /Users/bruce/CodeProjects/syncplay/.agent-tasks/v0.6.1/v0.6.1-B/
```

### 2. 读 fix 任务书 (这是 NEED FIX 任务, 不是新功能)
```bash
cat /Users/bruce/CodeProjects/syncplay/.agent-tasks/v0.6.1/v0.6.1-B/v0.6.1-B-fix-builder.md
```

### 3. 读 B-Tester 报告 (Section 9.2 上下文)
```bash
cat /Users/bruce/CodeProjects/syncplay/.agent-tasks/v0.6.1/v0.6.1-B/v0.6.1-B-test-report.md
```

### 4. 跑 Claude Code (ACP 模式, 加 bypassPermissions flag)
```bash
cd /Users/bruce/CodeProjects/syncplay
claude --add-dir /Users/bruce/CodeProjects/syncplay \
       --permission-mode bypassPermissions \
       -p "$(cat .agent-tasks/v0.6.1/v0.6.1-B/v0.6.1-B-fix-builder.md)"
```

### 5. 抓输出
- 找 `BUILDER_DONE: <commit-sha>` 标记
- 抓最后 50 行 stdout
- 失败抓全部 stderr

### 6. 验证 commit (改动应该 < 30 行)
```bash
cd /Users/bruce/CodeProjects/syncplay
git log -1 --format="%H %s"
git show --stat HEAD  # 确认 < 30 行
git show HEAD -- src/client/index.html src/client/app.js  # 确认只改这俩文件
npm test 2>&1 | tail -8  # 88/88
```

### 7. 亲测 Section 9.2 修复
- 用 `grep -c "videoHistoryClearAllBtn" src/client/index.html` 验证按钮加好
- 用 `grep "videoHistoryClearAllBtn" src/client/app.js` 验证 click handler 绑好
- 用 `git diff HEAD~1 src/client/app.js` 确认 videoHistory.clear() 函数本身**没**被改

### 8. 回报 Jarvis
- commit-sha
- commit message
- 改了哪些文件 (stat 行数, 应该 < 30 行)
- unit test 结果
- 9.2 fix 亲测结果
- 任何警告

## 红线 (per AGENT_PRACTICES)
- ❌ 不要让 Claude Code 改 `docs/CHANGELOG.md` / `docs/STATUS.md` / `AGENT_PRACTICES.md` (阶段 C 才改)
- ❌ 不要让 Claude Code git push (主 agent 统一 push)
- ❌ 不要在 prompt 里贴 ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
- ❌ 不要重试超过 1 次
- ❌ 不要让 Claude Code 重做整个 B 任务 (只修 9.2)
- ❌ 不要让 Claude Code 改 videoHistory.clear() 内部
- ✅ 跑完立刻 push 完工事件给 Jarvis (per MEMORY #20)

Thinking.text:
The user is asking me to act as a Builder orchestrator. I need to run Claude Code in ACP harness mode to fix Section 9.2 in the syncplay project. Let me follow the steps carefully.

Let me start by verifying the environment and reading the relevant files.

Thinking.text: Good, environment is verified. Now let me read the fix task and the test report.

Good, I now have a clear understanding. The fix is straightforward:
1. Add `<button id="videoHistoryClearAllBtn">` to `src/client/index.html` inside `<div id="videoHistoryList">`
2. Add click handler in `src/client/app.js` that calls `videoHistory.clear()`
3. Don't change `videoHistory.clear()` itself
4. Run npm test (must stay 88/88)
5. git commit (no push)

Now let me run Claude Code in ACP harness mode with bypassPermissions flag. The task is clear. Let me run it.

ToolUse.name: cd /Users/bruce/CodeProjects/syncplay && cat .agent-tasks/v0.6.1/v0.6.1-B/v0.6.1-B-fix-builder.md | wc -l

Thinking.text:
Now I have the picture. Let me check the `setupHistoryUI` function and how render works to understand where to add the click handler. I need to also see what happens when list is empty - line 173 sets listEl.innerHTML to empty div, which would wipe out the button if I put it in the list. Let me re-read the task instructions. Wait - the task says to put the button in the videoHistoryList div. But render() at line 173 wipes innerHTML if list is empty! This means: - If list is empty, the button would be wiped by `listEl.innerHTML = '
暂无历史
';` - If list has items, render() also wipes innerHTML This is a problem. Looking at the tester report: the suggestion was either: 1. Put button in `.video-history-section` (outside the list) 2. Or render it dynamically in render() Wait, the task says "在 `
` 里**末尾**加一个"清空所有"按钮" - put it in the list div. But render() will wipe it! Actually, I should re-read the task. The task is from a sub-builder. Maybe the sub-builder needs to be told this important context. Let me check if I should warn Claude about this. Actually, looking at the task description carefully: - 位置: 列表底部, 在所有 video-history-item 之后 - 放在 videoHistoryList div **里面** (这样 toggle 列表时一起 show/hide) The task author didn't account for render() wiping innerHTML. This is a real concern. But the sub-agent should figure it out. Actually I should let the agent know about this. Let me think about this more carefully... Hmm, the task is for the sub-agent to do the fix. The sub-agent should be able to figure out that the button will get wiped by render(). Or maybe the cleanest approach is: - Put the button OUTSIDE the list div but in the same section - Or modify render() to append the button Wait - I shouldn't override the task instructions. The task said to put it inside videoHistoryList. The sub-agent needs to handle the render() override. Or put it in the list section outside the list. Looking again at the original test report suggestion: "`src/client/index.html` 在 `.video-history-section` 末尾加 `

content.Text: Now let me check the `render()` function and the area around it, to understand if the button can survive `listEl.innerHTML = ...`:

Thinking.text:
Now I have a critical concern: the `render()` function in `videoHistory` at line 173, 178 sets `listEl.innerHTML = ...` which would WIPE OUT any button inside the list div. This means putting the button inside `videoHistoryList` won't work.

The right place is OUTSIDE `videoHistoryList` but inside `.video-history-section` (per tester's original suggestion). OR the agent needs to modify `render()` to preserve the button.

This is important context. The sub-agent must NOT put the button inside `videoHistoryList` because render() will wipe it. The button needs to be in `.video-history-section` outside `videoHistoryList`.

Hmm, but the task says "放在 videoHistoryList div **里面** (这样 toggle 列表时一起 show/hide)". This is a contradiction. Let me see how the sub-agent handles it.

Actually wait - let me look more carefully. The task is the sub-agent's job. The orchestrator should pass it the task and let the sub-agent handle the implementation details. The sub-agent should be smart enough to figure this out. Or it should be mentioned in the prompt.

Actually, given the rendering issue, I should let the sub-agent figure this out. If they put it inside the list and it gets wiped, they'll see that it doesn't work and fix it. Let me run the task as specified.

Actually, let me include a small hint about this in the prompt, since the task is from the orchestrator's perspective. No wait - the orchestrator shouldn't override the task content. The task is the task. Let me just run it.

Actually, re-reading the task again carefully:
- "位置: 列表底部, 在所有 video-history-item 之后"
- "放在 videoHistoryList div **里面** (这样 toggle 列表时一起 show/hide)"

The task author may have miscounted how render() works. The sub-agent needs to figure this out. I'll run the task and let the sub-agent solve it. If the agent puts the button in `videoHistoryList` and it gets wiped, they will discover this when they run the verification.

Let me now run Claude Code. Per instructions:
- Use `--add-dir` (already in command)
- Use `--permission-mode bypassPermissions` (per the critical fix note)
- Use `-p` to pass the prompt

## ✅ 完工回报 (BUILDER_DONE: e0fe399) ### Commit - **SHA**: `e0fe39983f4614f718b2513aa69045f54d176630` - **Message**: `fix(v0.6.1-B): add 清空所有 button + wire videoHistory.clear()` - **Author**: bruce (openclaw@claw.com) — 2026-06-10 21:04 +0800 ### Diff 统计 (合规) ``` src/client/app.js | 13 ++++++++++++- src/client/index.html | 5 +++++ 2 files changed, 17 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-) ``` - ✅ 改动 < 30 行 (实际 18 行) - ✅ 只动 `src/client/app.js` + `src/client/index.html` - ✅ 没碰 red-line (`docs/`, `AGENT_PRACTICES.md`, `agentWorkflowAndTemplates/`) - ✅ 没 token leak - ✅ 没 git push (本地 ahead of origin/main 5 commits, 等阶段 C 统一推) ### Section 9.2 修复细节 **index.html** (新增 5 行): ```html
``` 放在 `
` **外面** (作为 sibling), 默认 `display: none`。 **app.js** (新增 12 行, 改 1 行): - 改 toggle handler 同步切换 footer 的 display - 新增 click listener 给 `videoHistoryClearAllBtn` → 调 `videoHistory.clear()` (复用, 含 confirm 弹框) ### ⚠️ 关键设计决策 (agent 主动发现) Sub-agent 自己发现并解决了任务书里的一个潜在坑: - **问题**: 任务书说"放在 `videoHistoryList` div **里面**",但 `videoHistory.render()` (L173, L178) 用 `listEl.innerHTML = ...` 会**清空**所有子节点 → 按钮会被擦掉 - **解决**: 把按钮放成 `videoHistoryList` 的 **sibling**, 用 JS 同步 toggle 列表和 footer 的 display - **效果**: 行为等价 (列表展开时按钮跟着出现), 不破坏 `render()` 函数, 符合"不改 `videoHistory.clear()` 也不改其他"的红线 ### 验收清单 (9 项全过) - [x] 1. index.html 加按钮: `grep -c "videoHistoryClearAllBtn" src/client/index.html` = 1 ✅ - [x] 2. 按钮在 video-history-section 内 (sibling of listEl, 等价语义) ✅ - [x] 3. app.js 绑 click: `grep "videoHistoryClearAllBtn" src/client/app.js` 命中 addEventListener ✅ - [x] 4. 调 `videoHistory.clear()` (不是 refresh 或别的) ✅ - [x] 5. `videoHistory.clear()` 函数体**未**改 (sed 153-158 行跟 HEAD~1 字节级一致) ✅ - [x] 6. `npm test` = 88/88 pass (duration 121ms) ✅ - [x] 7. 没碰 red-line 文件 ✅ - [x] 8. commit message 规范 ✅ - [x] 9. 改动 < 30 行 (18 行) ✅ ### 警告 无。Claude Code 一次跑通, 用时约 30 秒, 没有任何 retry / permission 阻塞 (`--permission-mode bypassPermissions` 生效)。 ### 红线自检 - ❌ 没改 STATUS/CHANGELOG/ROADMAP/AGENT_PRACTICES/agentWorkflowAndTemplates ✅ - ❌ 没 git push ✅ - ❌ 没在 prompt 贴 ANTHROPIC_API_KEY ✅ - ❌ 没重试 ✅ - ❌ 没让 Claude Code 重做整个 B 任务 ✅ - ❌ 没改 `videoHistory.clear()` 内部 ✅ - ❌ 没写新测试 ✅ - ✅ 完工事件已发回 (本回报)**Jarvis 可直接进入阶段 C** (写 e2e 测试 + 改 docs/STATUS.md + git push)。

1 # Builder 任务书 - v0.6.1-B-fix (修 B-Tester Section 9.2 FAIL) 2 3 > **任务 ID**: v0.6.1-B-fix 4 > **被修 commit**: 88f27b2 (B-Builder feat) 5 > **被测 commit**: c020d16 (B-Tester report - FAIL Section 9.2) 6 > **优先级**: P0 (B 验收 NEED FIX, 不能 ship) 7 > **预计工作量**: < 15 分钟, 1-2 个文件 8 > **最后更新**: 2026-06-10 9 10 --- 11 12 ## ⚠️ 这是 NEED FIX 任务,不是新功能任务 13 14 B-Builder 之前的工作**大部分已 PASS** (36/38), 但有 **1 个真 bug** 必须修才能 ship。 15 16 ## 必读 context (先读完再动手) 17 18 1. `/Users/bruce/CodeProjects/syncplay/AGENT_PRACTICES.md` —— 必读 #1-#19 19 2. `/Users/bruce/CodeProjects/syncplay/.agent-tasks/v0.6.1/v0.6.1-B/v0.6.1-B-test-report.md` —— **必读** Section 9.2 (FAIL 描述 + 修法建议) 20 3. `/Users/bruce/CodeProjects/syncplay/src/client/index.html` —— 加"清空所有"按钮 21 4. `/Users/bruce/CodeProjects/syncplay/src/client/app.js` —— 已有 `videoHistory.clear()` 方法 (L153-158), 含 confirm 弹框 22 5. `/Users/bruce/CodeProjects/syncplay/src/client/style.css` —— 可能要加点样式 23 24 --- 25 26 ## 自我验证 (必做, 不做不要动手) 27 28 **stdout 输出**这段: 29 30 ``` 31 ✓ 已读 v0.6.1-B-test-report.md (N 行, 关键: Section 9.2 FAIL - 缺"清空所有"按钮) 32 ✓ 已读 src/client/index.html (找 video history 区域) 33 ✓ 已读 src/client/app.js (L153-158 已有 videoHistory.clear() 实现) 34 ✓ 任务目标复述: 在 index.html 加"清空所有"按钮 + 在 app.js 绑定 click → videoHistory.clear() (复用现有方法, 含 confirm 弹窗) 35 ``` 36 37 如果任何文件读失败, **立刻报告失败并停止**: 38 ``` 39 ✗ 读 <文件路径> 失败: <错误> 40 请主 agent 修 41 ``` 42 43 --- 44 45 ## 目标 46 47 **只**修一个 bug: Section 9.2 FAIL。 48 49 **根因**: B-Builder 在 `src/client/app.js` 实现了 `videoHistory.clear()` (含 `confirm('确定清空所有视频历史? 此操作不可恢复。')`), 但**没在 index.html 加"清空所有"按钮**, 也**没**在 app.js 给按钮绑 click 事件 → 用户从 UI 触发不了清空。 50 51 **修法** (per Tester 报告建议): 52 53 ### 1. `src/client/index.html` 加按钮 54 - 在 `
` 里**末尾**加一个"清空所有"按钮 55 - 位置: 列表底部, 在所有 video-history-item 之后 56 - 建议结构: 57 ```html 58
59 62
63 ``` 64 - 放在 videoHistoryList div **里面** (这样 toggle 列表时一起 show/hide) 65 66 ### 2. `src/client/app.js` 绑 click 事件 67 - 在现有 `listEl.addEventListener('click', ...)` 监听**同一个 listener 里**加分支 68 - 或者新建一个**单独**的 click listener 给 `videoHistoryClearAllBtn` 69 - 推荐: 单独 listener, 更清晰 70 ```js 71 document.getElementById('videoHistoryClearAllBtn').addEventListener('click', () => { 72 videoHistory.clear(); // 复用现有方法, 含 confirm 弹框 73 }); 74 ``` 75 - **不要**重新实现 confirm 弹框, 也不要重新调 IPC — `videoHistory.clear()` 已经有了 76 77 ### 3. (可选) `src/client/style.css` 加样式 78 - `.video-history-footer` flex 布局, 居中按钮 79 - `.btn-danger` 红色背景, 警示效果 80 - **不**强制 — 没样式也 PASS (Tasker 不会检查 CSS) 81 82 --- 83 84 ## 详细要求 85 86 ### 必做项 87 88 1. 加 `

content.Text:
1	# 测试报告 - v0.6.1-B 客户端 UI + 集成
2	
3	> **任务 ID**: v0.6.1-B
4	> **被测 commit**: 88f27b2 (`feat(v0.6.1-B): video history UI in renderer`)
5	> **测试时间**: 2026-06-10 20:00
6	> **测试者**: Claude Code (Tester 实例, fresh context)
7	> **最后更新**: 2026-06-10
8	
9	---
10	
11	## 测试环境
12	
13	| 项 | 值 |
14	|---|---|
15	| **平台** | macOS 15.7.5 (Darwin 24.6.0) |
16	| **架构** | arm64 (Apple Silicon) |
17	| **网络** | 沙箱无网络, URL 加载失败 (用 IPC 直接测数据) |
18	| **依赖** | Node 22.22.1 / npm 10.9.4 / Electron 33.x (desktop/node_modules) |
19	| **目标用户视角** | SyncPlay desktop app 真实用户, 用 macOS 桌面 app 加视频 + 同步 |
20	| **测试方法** | 自定义 test-b-main.js + test-b-preload.js (模拟 desktop main process), 用 webContents.executeJavaScript 跑 renderer 端断言. userData 设到 /tmp 隔离. |
21	
22	---
23	
24	## 验证清单结果
25	
26	> 每项 PASS/FAIL + 证据。无证据的 FAIL 不算。
27	
28	### 1. UI 元素 + 样式
29	
30	| # | 验证项 | 结果 | 证据 |
31	|---|---|---|---|
32	| 1.1 | `videoHistoryToggleBtn` 在 HTML | ✅ PASS | `grep -c "videoHistoryToggleBtn" src/client/index.html` 输出 `1` (L28) |
33	| 1.2 | `videoHistoryList` 在 HTML | ✅ PASS | `grep -c "videoHistoryList" src/client/index.html` 输出 `1` (L31) |
34	| 1.3 | `video-history-*` CSS 至少 3 处 | ✅ PASS | `grep -c "video-history-list\|video-history-item\|video-history-missing" src/client/style.css` 输出 `6` (lines 287, 309, 320, 324, 385, 391). CSS 完整. |
35	
36	**1.x 原始命令输出**:
37	```
38	$ grep -c "videoHistoryToggleBtn" src/client/index.html
39	1
40	$ grep -c "videoHistoryList" src/client/index.html
41	1
42	$ grep -c "video-history-list\|video-history-item\|video-history-missing" src/client/style.css
43	6
44	```
45	
46	UI 元素初始状态 (loadFile 后):
47	```
48	[TEST-B-RESULT] ui-elements: {
49	  "hasToggleBtn": true,
50	  "hasListEl": true,
51	  "hasCountEl": true,
52	  "toggleBtnText": "📜 历史 (0)",
53	  "listInitialDisplay": "none",
54	  "countInitial": "0"
55	}
56	```
57	
58	---
59	
60	### 2. 自动写历史 (本地)
61	
62	| # | 验证项 | 结果 | 证据 |
63	|---|---|---|---|
64	| 2.1 | 选一个本地视频 → 自动写 | ✅ PASS (代码层) | `src/client/app.js:614-621` change listener 调 `await videoHistory.addLocal(file)`. Harness 验证: 触发 change 事件后 `loadVideo(url, '本地: ' + file.name)` 跑了 (`fileName: "视频加载失败"` 是 loadVideo 之后的错误状态, 说明 change handler 跑过). |
65	| 2.2 | 落盘 JSON | ✅ PASS (IPC 层) | 验证项 2.1 的 addLocal 调用 `window.desktopAPI.videoHistory.add({type:'local', path, name, size, mtime, addedAt})`. IPC 端 (A 任务已验证) 写 electron-store. 显式调用 IPC 也成功: 测试 add-local 加 `path: '/Users/bruce/Movies/inception.mp4'` 入 store, `count: 1` 后 IPC 返 1 item. |
66	| 2.3 | JSON 字段完整 (path/name/size/mtime/addedAt) | ✅ PASS | `app.js:124-131` addLocal 传 `type/path/name/size/mtime/addedAt`. A 任务 schema 验证已 PASS. 这次本地项 IPC 落盘: `{"type":"local","path":"/Users/bruce/Movies/inception.mp4","name":"inception.mp4","size":1000,"mtime":1700000000000,"addedAt":<ts>}` |
67	| 2.4 | path 字段 = 绝对路径 | ✅ PASS | addLocal 调 `webUtils.getPathForFile(file)` (Electron 30+). 测试注入的 `.path` 是 `/Users/bruce/Movies/inception.mp4` (绝对路径, 不是 file:// 也不是空). 实际用户用文件选择器, 路径也是绝对. |
68	
69	**2.x 关键证据**:
70	```
71	[TEST-B-RESULT] add-local: {
72	  "count": 1,                                       ← UI 显示 1 条
73	  "ipcItems": [{"type":"local","path":"/Users/bruce/Movies/inception.mp4","name":"inception.mp4","size":1000,"mtime":1700000000000,"addedAt":<ts>}],
74	  "uiItems": [{"name":"inception.mp4","path":"/Users/bruce/Movies/inception.mp4","icon":"📁"}]
75	}
76	```
77	
78	注 1: 测试中合成的 `File` 对象没有真实 filesystem 路径, `webUtils.getPathForFile(file)` 返 `""`. 这是 Electron 行为, 不是 bug. 真实文件选择器选的文件有真实路径, addLocal 链路会正常. **addLocal 链路端到端可工作 (代码层 + IPC 层都验证), 真实 picker 场景依赖 Electron file input 行为** (A 任务已验证 webUtils.getPathForFile 用真实文件返真实路径).
79	
80	注 2: 用 `Object.defineProperty(file, 'path', ...)` 注入 path 也没生效 (Browser Security/File 对象不可写), 但 IPC 直接 add 验证了 schema/存储/渲染都对.
81	
82	---
83	
84	### 3. 自动写历史 (URL)
85	
86	| # | 验证项 | 结果 | 证据 |
87	|---|---|---|---|
88	| 3.1 | 粘贴 URL + 点加载 | ✅ PASS | 测试 `input.value = 'https://www.w3schools.com/html/mov_bbb.mp4'; btn.click();`. 沙箱网络隔离下 loadedmetadata **没有**触发 (URL 不...

content.Text:
**BUILDER_DONE: e0fe399**

Summary of fix:
- **index.html**: Added `<div class="video-history-footer">` containing `<button id="videoHistoryClearAllBtn">🗑️ 清空所有历史</button>` as a sibling of `videoHistoryList` inside `.video-history-section` (initially `display: none`)
- **app.js**: Updated toggle handler to also show/hide the footer together with the list; added a separate click listener for the clear button that calls `videoHistory.clear()` (reuses existing method with confirm dialog)
- **Why sibling, not inside listEl**: `videoHistory.render()` uses `innerHTML` to reset listEl's children, so anything inside gets wiped on first render. Placing as sibling + JS toggle gives identical behavior without modifying `render()` or `videoHistory.clear()`.
- **Unit tests**: 88/88 pass (unchanged)
- **Total diff**: 17 insertions, 1 deletion across 2 files
- **Did not touch**: `videoHistory.clear()`, `desktop/`, `docs/`, `AGENT_PRACTICES.md`, `agentWorkflowAndTemplates/`
Shell cwd was reset to /Users/bruce/.openclaw/workspace/claude

content.Text:
=== Commit info ===
e0fe39983f4614f718b2513aa69045f54d176630 fix(v0.6.1-B): add 清空所有 button + wire videoHistory.clear()

=== Diff stat ===
commit e0fe39983f4614f718b2513aa69045f54d176630
Author: bruce <openclaw@claw.com>
Date:   Wed Jun 10 21:04:01 2026 +0800

    fix(v0.6.1-B): add 清空所有 button + wire videoHistory.clear()
    
    B-Tester Section 9.2 FAIL: clear() 方法已实现 + confirm 弹框已有,
    但 index.html 没 UI 按钮, 用户触发不了清空.
    
    Fix:
    - index.html: add <button id="videoHistoryClearAllBtn">🗑️ 清空所有历史</button>
      inside .video-history-section (sibling of #videoHistoryList, initially hidden)
    - app.js: bind click → videoHistory.clear() (复用现有方法, 含 confirm 弹框)
    - app.js: toggle handler 也切换 footer 的 display (跟列表同步 show/hide)
    
    按钮放 listEl **外面** (作为 sibling) — 因为 videoHistory.render()
    用 innerHTML 重置 listEl 子元素, 放在里面会被清空. 放在 sibling 用
    JS 同步 toggle, 行为等价 + 不破坏 render() 函数.
    
    不改 videoHistory.clear() 函数本身 (已对, 复用即可).
    
    Unit test: 88/88 pass (existing, no new tests in this fix)
    
    Lesson: AGENT_PRACTICES #16 (--add-dir)

 src/client/index.html |  5 +++++
 2 files changed, 17 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)
